manifest.name: Blueprint

name: Blueprint

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
A new significative update to Blueprint, with one (minor) breaking change!

Big thanks to @TrigamDev for their first contributions and for the details bug reports and suggestions 🙌🏻 

## ⚠️ BREAKING CHANGE

- Nunjucks blocks are not automatically trimmed anymore. You will have to explicitely decide where you want spacing to be removed. This avoids a lot of weird behaviors so I think this is a good change. Please refer to Nunjucks' [whitespace control documentation](https://mozilla.github.io/nunjucks/templating.html#whitespace-control) for syntax help.

## :sparkles: Added

- Add experimental support for syntax highlighting. This has to be enabled through a setting that is available in Obsidian's plugin settings menu.
- Add support for anchor-based sections. This means that instead of having a section defined by a header, you can put a `^section-id` block anchor and use the name as the section name. Refer to Obsidian's [Link to a block in a note](https://obsidian.md/help/links#Link%20to%20a%20block%20in%20a%20note) documentation for details about block anchors.

## 📝  Changes

- A notice will be displayed when a Blueprint is successfully applied to a single note. It won't show up when bulk applying.
- Blueprint-related actions in the file navigator are now regrouped in a Blueprint submenu.
- When creating a Blueprint or a note from a Blueprint, the blueprint's or note's name is now automatically focused.

## :link: Links

- GitHub repo: <https://github.com/madx/blueprint-obsidian-plugin>
- Documentation: <https://github.com/madx/blueprint-obsidian-plugin#documentation>

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This adds new helpers and quality of life features.

## :sparkles: Added

- Add a Blueprint view based on regular `MarkdownView` (allows editing blueprint files from within Obsidian)
- Add commands and folder right-click actions to create new blueprints
- Add a `get_frontmatter`helper to get frontmatter from other notes or from properties in a blueprint. E.g.

```markdown
<!-- resolve source property as a note and get its picture property -->
{{ get_frontmatter(source).picture }}
```

## :link: Links

- GitHub repo: <https://github.com/madx/blueprint-obsidian-plugin>
- Documentation: <https://github.com/madx/blueprint-obsidian-plugin#documentation>

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release adds new helpers and quality of life features.

## :sparkles: Added

- Add a command to apply blueprints in all notes in your vault (⚠️ might be dangerous! proceed with caution)
- Add Create note from blueprint functionality
- Add a `prefix_lines` helper that adds a given prefix to every line of a string. Useful for callouts:

```markdown
> [!info] Callout title
{{ callout_content | prefix_lines("> ") }}
```

## 📝  Changes

- `to_embed` now supports embedding URLs as standard Markdown links
- Renamed `New note from blueprint` command to `Create new note from blueprint`, for consistency

## :link: Links

- GitHub repo: <https://github.com/madx/blueprint-obsidian-plugin>
- Documentation: <https://github.com/madx/blueprint-obsidian-plugin#documentation>

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release adds a bunch of new features that will make Blueprint more useful.

## ❗ Breaking change

- Blueprint files should now use the `.blueprint` file extension. You current setup won't break, but you won't be able to use the "Update all notes using this blueprint" feature without this.

## ✨ Added

- Allow setting frontmatter properties in blueprints.
- Update all notes using a given blueprint through the file explorer or the command palette.
- `moment` is now available as a global variable in your blueprints.

## :link: Links

- GitHub repo: <https://github.com/madx/blueprint-obsidian-plugin>
- Documentation: <https://github.com/madx/blueprint-obsidian-plugin#documentation>

releases.name: 0.0.5 (BETA)

releases.author: madx
releases.description:
## :sparkles: Added

- You can now apply Blueprints to an entire folder at once. All notes with a `blueprint` property will get updated.
- A new `__TOP__` special section name has been added. It allows you to expand a section to everything that is above the first heading of a note.
- Blueprint is now installable through [BRAT](<https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat>).

## :wrench: Fixed

- Section handling is much more robust and less likely to nuke your contents (which is objectively a good thing :rofl:)
- Various code fixes and removal of old code from the proof-of-concept.

## :link: Links

- GitHub repo: <https://github.com/madx/blueprint-obsidian-plugin>
- Documentation: <https://github.com/madx/blueprint-obsidian-plugin#documentation>
releases.name: 0.0.4 (BETA)

releases.author: madx
releases.description:
- Improves `{% section %}` tag handling to include subsections
- Add a way to include everything that is before the first header with `{% section "___TOP___" %}`
